name: Stench
description: By releasing a stench when the Pokémon deals damage with its moves, there is a 10% chance that targets will flinch. This does not stack with moves or items that have a chance to flinch.

name: Drizzle
description: Drizzle summons rain weather when the Pokemon enters battle, lasting 8 turns (12 with Damp Rock held). Rain boosts Water moves by 50% and cuts Fire damage by 50%. Certain moves and abilities have special interactions with rain. Cannot override primal weather conditions.

name: Speed Boost
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat at the end of every turn.

name: Battle Armor
description: Incoming damage is reduced by 20% (x0.8), multiplicative with other damage reduction. Additionally, critical hits are blocked, functioning as regular hits and not activating on-crit effects like To The Bone's bleed.

name: Sturdy
description: If the Pokémon has full HP and takes damage from a move that would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP. The Pokémon is also immune to one-hit KO moves.

name: Damp
description: If the user makes contact with another Pokemon, offensively or defensively, the other Pokemon's type is changed to pure Water. This happens immediately for multihit or priority moves and can remove STAB in the middle of an enemy's multihit move.

name: Limber
description: All recoil damage to the user is halved; this includes moves with scaling recoil damage like Brave Bird, moves with crash damage like Jump Kick, or moves with fixed recoil like Steel Beam. Paralysis also cannot affect the user, and if they gain Limber, existing paralysis is cured.

name: Sand Veil
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in a sandstorm. The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms if it would otherwise.

name: Static
description: 30% chance to paralyze on contact, 10% on non-contact.

name: Volt Absorb
description: Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore ¼ of its max HP.

name: Water Absorb
description: Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore ¼ of its max HP.

name: Oblivious
description: This Pokemon is immune to infatuation, Scare, Intimidate and Taunt. When gaining this ability while afflicted by any of the mentioned statuses, instantly cures them.

name: Cloud Nine
description: Eliminates the effects of weather.

name: Compound Eyes
description: The Pokémon’s compound eyes boost the accuracy of its moves by 30%.

name: Insomnia
description: The Pokémon’s insomnia prevents it from becoming drowsy or being put to sleep.

name: Color Change
description: Transforms the user into the best defensive type before taking damage. Prioritizes immunities over resistances. Only changes to a pure type. Once per turn.

name: Immunity
description: Prevents poisoning. Reduces all Poison-type damage by 50%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction. If poisoned when gaining this ability, the poison is immediately cured.

name: Flash Fire
description: If hit by a Fire-type move, the Pokémon absorbs the flames and uses them to power up its own Fire-type moves by 50%.

name: Shield Dust
description: Protective dust shields the Pokémon, making it immune to additional effects from attacks.

name: Own Tempo
description: Grants immunity to confusion, Intimidate, and Scare. Immediately cures confusion when receiving this ability.

name: Suction Cups
description: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.

name: Intimidate
description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

name: Shadow Tag
description: Prevents all non-Shadow Tag or Ghost-type foes from switching out. Pokemon holding Shed Shell or using a pivot move such as Flip Turn can escape. Activates during the next turn if the user switches in mid battle.

name: Rough Skin
description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, its rough skin damages the attacker equal to ⅛ of their max HP.

name: Wonder Guard
description: Its mysterious power only lets supereffective moves hit the Pokémon.

name: Levitate
description: The user is immune to Ground- type moves and other ground effects such as Spikes and terrains. Boosts the damage of Flying-type moves by 25%.

name: Effect Spore
description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being poisoned, paralyzed, or put to sleep.

name: Synchronize
description: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, poisoned, or badly poisoned by another Pokémon’s move or Ability, that Pokémon will also be inflicted with the same status condition. If this Pokémon is your lead into battle, opposing wild Pokémon will share its nature.

name: Clear Body
description: The Pokémon’s stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

name: Natural Cure
description: The Pokémon’s status conditions are cured when it switches out of battle.

name: Lightning Rod
description: The user draws in Electric-type moves and gains immunity to them. Additionally, Electric-type moves boost the highest attacking stat of the user by one stage.

name: Serene Grace
description: Doubles the likelihood of additional effects occurring when the Pokémon uses its moves. This does not affect items.

name: Swift Swim
description: Boosts Speed by 50% during rain.

name: Chlorophyll
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed by 50% during sun.

name: Illuminate
description: Boosts the user's accuracy by 1.2x. Removes Ghost-typing on target when landing an attack.

name: Trace
description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it changes its Ability to match that of an opponent.

name: Huge Power
description: Doubles the power of the Pokémon’s physical moves.

name: Poison Point
description: Has a 30% chance to inflict poison on contact moves, both when attacking and being attacked.

name: Inner Focus
description: Focus Blast never misses. Unaffected by flinch, Intimidate, or Scare.

name: Magma Armor
description: Immune to frostbite. Reduces damage received from Water and Ice-type moves by 30%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.

name: Water Veil
description: Uses Aqua Ring on entry, which restores 1/16 HP each turn. Grants immunity to burn status and removes burn on switching in.

name: Magnet Pull
description: Prevents Steel-type Pokemon from switching out while the user is present. Ghost-types are immune to this effect. Pokemon holding Shed Shell or using a pivot move such as Flip Turn can escape. Activates during the next turn if the user switches in mid battle.

name: Soundproof
description: Soundproofing gives the Pokémon full immunity to all sound-based moves.

name: Rain Dish
description: Restores 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn in rain.

name: Sand Stream
description: Summons a Sandstorm for 8 turns (12 with Smooth Rock) on entry. Damages non-Rock/Ground/Steel types by 1/16 HP per turn. Rock- types gain a 50% Special Defense boost. Halves the effectiveness of sun related moves.

name: Pressure
description: Doubles PP usage of opposing moves and clears all positive stat stages on entry.

name: Thick Fat
description: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

name: Early Bird
description: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.

name: Flame Body
description: Contact with this Pokemon has a 30% chance to inflict burn. Non- contact has a 20% chance. Works offensively and defensively.

name: Run Away
description: Guarantees successful escape from wild Pokemon battles regardless of speed differences. When any of the user's stats are lowered by an opponent's move or ability, raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

name: Keen Eye
description: Prevents accuracy stat stage drops. All moves gain a 1.2x accuracy boost.

name: Hyper Cutter
description: Hyper Cutter prevents enemies from lowering the user's Attack stat through moves or abilities. All contact moves used by this Pokemon have their critical hit rate increased by one stage.

name: Pickup
description: Clears all entry hazards from your side of the field when entering battle. The Pokemon is still susceptible to hazards while clearing them.

name: Truant
description: Each time the Pokémon uses a move, it spends the next turn loafing around.

name: Hustle
description: Boosts the power of attacks by 1.4x but reduces their accuracy by 10%. Only affects non-status moves.

name: Cute Charm
description: When hit by making contact (offensively or defensively), has a 50% chance to infatuate the attacker (cuts their Attack and Special Attack in half). This only works on Pokemon of the opposite gender.

name: Plus
description: Doubles the Pokemon's offensive power when partnered with an ally that has Plus or Minus.

name: Minus
description: Doubles the Pokemon's offensive power when partnered with an ally that has Minus or Plus.

name: Forecast
description: The Pokémon transforms with the weather to change its type to Water, Fire, or Ice.

name: Sticky Hold
description: The Pokémon’s held items cling to its sticky body and cannot be stolen or removed by other Pokémon.

name: Shed Skin
description: The Pokémon has a 30% chance to cure its own status conditions at the end of every turn by shedding its skin.

name: Guts
description: The Pokémon is so gutsy that when it has a status condition, its Attack stat is boosted by 50%. Being burned does not halve the damage dealt by the Pokémon’s physical moves.

name: Marvel Scale
description: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its marvelous scales boost its Defense stat by 50%.

name: Liquid Ooze
description: The strong stench of the Pokémon’s oozed liquid damages attackers that use HP-draining moves instead of healing them.

name: Overgrow
description: Boosts the power of Grass-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.

name: Blaze
description: Boosts the power of Fire-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.

name: Torrent
description: Boosts the power of Water-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.

name: Swarm
description: Boosts the power of Bug-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.

name: Rock Head
description: Prevents all recoil damage from the user's moves and abilities. Also grants immunity to enrage recoil damage. Does not prevent crash damage or Explosion/Self- Destruct damage.

name: Drought
description: Summons harsh sunlight for 8 turns (12 with Heat Rock) on entry. Boosts Fire moves by 50%, reduces Water moves by 50%. Activates extra effects on sun related moves.

name: Arena Trap
description: Prevents all non-levitating or Ghost-type foes from switching out. Pokemon holding Shed Shell or using a pivot move such as Flip Turn can escape. Activates during the next turn if the user switches in mid battle

name: Vital Spirit
description: Immune to sleep. When the Pokemon uses a Fighting-type move, it heals all status conditions immediately after the move resolves. Removes sleep when gained.

name: White Smoke
description: Sets Smokescreen on entry, lasting 3 turns. Smokescreen increases the evasiveness of your party by 25%.

name: Pure Power
description: Increases the user's Attack stat by 2x. Multiplicative with other damage boosts.

name: Shell Armor
description: Incoming damage is reduced by 20% (x0.8), multiplicative with other damage reduction. Additionally, critical hits are blocked, functioning as regular hits and not activating on-crit effects like To The Bone's bleed.

name: Air Lock
description: Sets Tailwind for 3 turns and clears all weather effects on entry. Primal weathers are suppressed. Weather can still be set while the user is on the field, but will have no effect until the user switches.

name: Tangled Feet
description: When the user is confused or enraged, the Pokemon uses its Speed stat instead of Defense or Special Defense for damage calculations. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.

name: Motor Drive
description: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Electric-type moves. Instead, its Speed stat is boosted.

name: Rivalry
description: The Pokémon’s competitive spirit boosts the power of its moves by 25% against targets of the same gender, and lowers it by 25% against targets of the opposite gender. The power remains the same as usual if either Pokémon’s gender is unknown.

name: Steadfast
description: The Pokémon’s determination boosts its Speed stat when it flinches.

name: Snow Cloak
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in snow or hail. The Pokémon takes no damage from hail if it would otherwise.

name: Gluttony
description: Berries that normally activate at 1/4 HP trigger at 1/2 HP instead. Additionally, after consuming any berry, the user recovers 1/3 of max HP. Does not include berries consumed through moves like Pluck.

name: Anger Point
description: When hit, raises the user's Attack by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.

name: Unburden
description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat when its held item is consumed or lost.

name: Heatproof
description: The Pokémon’s heatproof body halves the damage taken from burns and Fire-type moves.

name: Simple
description: Doubles the effects of the Pokémon’s stat changes.

name: Dry Skin
description: Restores ¼ of the Pokémon’s max HP when hit by Water-type moves or ⅛ of the its max HP at the end of every turn in rain. However, the Pokémon receives 25% more damage from Fire-type moves and loses ⅛ of its max HP at the end of every turn in harsh sunlight.

name: Download
description: The Pokémon compares an opposing Pokémon’s Defense and Sp. Def stats before raising its own Attack or Sp. Atk stat — whichever will be more effective.

name: Iron Fist
description: Boosts the power of punching moves by 30%.

name: Poison Heal
description: If poisoned or badly poisoned, the Pokémon has ⅛ of its max HP restored at the end of every turn instead of losing HP.

name: Adaptability
description: Boosts the power of moves of the same type as the Pokémon by 100% instead of 50%. Does not stack with the Stellar-type Tera boost.

name: Skill Link
description: The Pokémon’s multistrike moves always hit the max amount of times.

name: Hydration
description: Cures the Pokémon’s status conditions at the end of every turn in rain.

name: Solar Power
description: Boosts the Pokemon's highest attacking stat by 50% during sun.

name: Quick Feet
description: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Speed stat is boosted by 50%. Being paralyzed does not lower the Pokémon’s Speed stat.

name: Normalize
description: Converts all damaging moves to Normal-type and grants a 10% power boost. Normal-type moves bypass resistances, but not immunities.

name: Sniper
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s critical hits by 125% instead of 50%.

name: Magic Guard
description: The Pokémon takes damage only from attacks.

name: No Guard
description: The Pokémon employs no-guard tactics to ensure incoming and outgoing attacks always land. If this Pokémon is your lead into battle, it raises the likelihood of double battles.

name: Stall
description: Reduces damage by 30% if the user has not moved yet. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources. Works when the user switches in mid-turn.

name: Technician
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 50% if their power is 60 or less.

name: Leaf Guard
description: During sun, cures all status conditions at the end of the turn.

name: Klutz (N)
description: Items do not work when held by the Pokémon.

name: Mold Breaker
description: The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the target, with certain exceptions.

name: Super Luck
description: The Pokémon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted by one stage.

name: Aftermath
description: Uses a 100 BP Explosion or Outburst (whichever is higher) when knocked out. Using explosion moves will always Flinch the target.

name: Anticipation
description: Alerts the Pokemon when facing opponents with super-effective moves on switch-in. Dodge the first super effective hit received in battle.

name: Forewarn
description: Casts an 80 BP Future Sight on the opposing Pokemon when switching in. Strikes 2 turns later, bypassing substitutes and other protections. The attack cannot miss once initiated and ignores accuracy checks. This cannot target the same Pokemon twice.

name: Unaware
description: The Pokémon ignores the target’s stat changes when attacking, and ignores the attacker’s stat changes when being attacked. It cannot ignore changes to the Speed stat, however.

name: Tinted Lens
description: The Pokémon’s "not very effective" attacks deal double damage.

name: Filter
description: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.

name: Slow Start
description: Halves Attack, Special Attack, and Speed for the first 5 turns after switching in. The turn counter resets each time the Pokemon switches out.

name: Scrappy
description: The user can land Normal and Fighting-type moves on Ghost- types for neutral damage. Grants immunity to Intimidate and Scare.

name: Storm Drain
description: The user draws in Water-type moves and gains immunity to them. Additionally, Water-type moves boost the highest attacking stat of the user by one stage.

name: Ice Body
description: Restores 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn in hail. Also grants immunity to hail damage.

name: Solid Rock
description: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.

name: Snow Warning
description: Summons hailstorm for 8 turns (12 with Icy Rock) on entry. Damages non-Ice types by 1/16 HP per turn. Boosts the Defense stat of Ice-type Pokemon by 50%. Halves the effectiveness of sun related moves.

name: Honey Gather
description: The Pokémon gathers Honey which is then sold for money after a battle is won, even if it did not participate.

name: Frisk
description: Upon entering battle, reveals the opponents' items and prevents them from working for 2 turns. Does not prevent Mega Stones and other similar items from working.

name: Reckless
description: Increases the damage of moves that cause recoil by 20%. This bonus also applies when moves gain recoil through other means, such as madness or abilities.

name: Multitype
description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the Plate it holds.

name: Flower Gift
description: During sun, boost base Special Attack and Special Defense by 50% for this Pokemon and all allies.

name: Bad Dreams
description: All sleeping opponents lose 25% of their max HP at the end of each turn.

name: Pickpocket
description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it will steal a held item from the attacker.

name: Sheer Force
description: Removes most beneficial secondary effects after landing attacks in exchange for a 1.3x boost. Notably prevents Life Orb recoil when using these moves. Removable effects include reducing the target's stats, increasing the user's stats, inflicting status on a target and flinching.

name: Contrary
description: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them — and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

name: Unnerve
description: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.

name: Defiant
description: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Attack stat is boosted sharply.

name: Defeatist
description: Halves both Attack and Special Attack stats when HP drops below 33% of maximum. Deactivates after healing above this threshold.

name: Cursed Body
description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the attacker has a 30% chance to have whichever move it last used disabled for 4 turns.

name: Healer
description: Gives a 30% chance to cure status conditions at the end of each turn for both the user and their ally if they are out in a double battle. Makes 2 separate checks for each Pokemon.

name: Friend Guard
description: In a double battle, the user's ally receives 50% less damage. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.

name: Weak Armor
description: When hit by a contact move, raises the user's Speed by 2 stages and lowers their defense by 1 stage. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.

name: Heavy Metal
description: Takes half damage from Ghost and Dark-type attacks. Doubles the Pokemon's weight, which affects some moves.

name: Light Metal
description: Light Metal halves the Pokemon's weight and boosts their Speed stat by 30%. Makes weight-based attacks such as Low Kick deal less damage against this Pokemon. However, it also decreases damage from the user's Heavy Slam and similar weight- based moves.

name: Multiscale
description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

name: Toxic Boost
description: Increases the Pokemon's Attack stat by 50% when poisoned (regular or badly poisoned). Immediately applies poison to user when in Toxic Terrain, regardless of them being grounded or not. Nullifies poison damage.

name: Flare Boost
description: When the Pokémon is burned, the power of its special moves are boosted by 50%.

name: Harvest
description: If the Pokémon has used a Berry, it has a 50% chance of creating another one at the end of every turn. In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon is guaranteed to create a Berry.

name: Telepathy
description: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies next to it in battle.

name: Moody
description: At the end of every turn, one of the Pokémon’s stats will be boosted sharply, but another will be lowered. Accuracy and evasiveness are excluded.

name: Overcoat
description: Provides immunity to weather damage from Sandstorm and Hail, and blocks all powder moves including Sleep Powder, Stun Spore, Poison Powder, Spore, Cotton Spore, Rage Powder, Powder, and Magic Powder. Also reduces incoming special damage by 20%. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.

name: Poison Touch
description: Has a 30% chance to inflict poison on contact moves, both when attacking and being attacked.

name: Regenerator
description: The Pokémon has ⅓ of its max HP restored when it switches out of battle.

name: Big Pecks
description: Boosts the power of contact moves by 30%.

name: Sand Rush
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat by 50% in sand. Also grants immunity to sandstorm damage.

name: Wonder Skin
description: Immune to all damage boosting ability effects from opponents, other than Parental Bond and Multi-Headed.

name: Analytic
description: When the user moves after the target, boosts attack power by 30%.

name: Illusion (N)
description: The Pokémon fools opponents by entering battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its party. It reverts to its usual appearance when it takes damage from a move.

name: Imposter
description: The Pokémon transforms into the Pokémon in front of it. It also copies all of that Pokémon’s stats apart from its HP. Copied moves have 5 PP each.

name: Infiltrator
description: When using its moves, the Pokémon ignores the effects of targets’ Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, and substitutes.

name: Mummy
description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its Ability changed to Mummy.

name: Moxie
description: When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, it shows moxie, which boosts its Attack stat.

name: Justified
description: Immune to Dark-type moves, and boost Attack by 1 stage when the user is hit by them.

name: Rattled
description: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

name: Magic Bounce
description: Instead of being affected by other Pokémon’s status moves, the Pokémon bounces them back at the user.

name: Sap Sipper
description: Immune to Grass-type moves, and boost highest attacking stat by 1 stage when the user is hit by them.

name: Prankster
description: Status moves gain +1 priority. Status moves fail when directly targeting opposing Dark-type Pokemon.

name: Sand Force
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves by 30% in a sandstorm. The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms if it would otherwise.

name: Iron Barbs
description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, its iron barbs damages the attacker equal to ⅛ of their max HP.

name: Zen Mode
description: The Pokémon changes its form to Zen Mode when its HP drops to ½ or less.

name: Victory Star
description: Boosts the user's and their ally's accuracy by 1.2x when active in a double battle.

name: Turboblaze
description: Allows moves to ignore the target's abilities and innates that interfere with effects or reduce damage. Does not bypass abilities that modify base stats such as Grass Pelt. Adds Fire to the user's typing. Retains Fire typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.

name: Teravolt
description: Allows moves to ignore the target's abilities and innates that interfere with effects or reduce damage. Does not bypass abilities that modify base stats such as Grass Pelt. Adds Electric to the user's typing. Retains Electric typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.

name: Aroma Veil
description: Protects the user and allies from infatuation, heal block effects, and disabling moves including Disable, Taunt, Encore, and Torment.

name: Flower Veil
description: If the Pokémon or its allies next to it in battle are Grass-type, they are immune to status conditions and cannot have their stats lowered.

name: Cheek Pouch
description: No effect.

name: Protean
description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use.

name: Fur Coat
description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from physical moves.

name: Magician
description: The user steals the target's held item when landing a non-contact move if they are currently holding no item. Does not work with Mega Stones and other similar items.

name: Bulletproof
description: The Pokémon is immune to ball and bomb moves.

name: Competitive
description: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted sharply.

name: Strong Jaw
description: Boosts the power of biting and fang moves by 30%.

name: Refrigerate
description: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Ice-type. If the user is Ice-type its Ice-type moves have a 10% frostbite chance, otherwise it gains Ice STAB.

name: Sweet Veil (P)
description: The Pokémon and its allies next to it in battle cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

name: Stance Change
description: The Pokémon changes into its Blade Forme when it attacks and changes into its Shield Forme when it uses the move King’s Shield.

name: Gale Wings
description: Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s Flying-type moves by 1 stage while its HP is full.

name: Mega Launcher
description: Boosts pulse, beam, ball, and aura moves by 30%.

name: Grass Pelt
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat by 50% on Grassy Terrain.

name: Symbiosis (N)
description: When an ally consumes an item, the Pokémon gives its own held item to that ally.

name: Tough Claws
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s contact moves by 30%.

name: Pixilate
description: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Fairy-type. If the user is Fairy-type its Fairy-type moves have a 10% infatuate chance, otherwise it gains Fairy STAB.

name: Gooey
description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s Speed stat is lowered.

name: Aerilate
description: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Flying-type. If the user is Flying-type its Flying-type moves are 10% faster, otherwise it gains Flying STAB.

name: Parental Bond
description: The Pokémon strikes twice, with the second strike dealing ¼ of the first attack’s power. Multistrike moves and moves that target multiple Pokémon are ignored.

name: Dark Aura
description: Boosts the power of the Dark-type moves of all Pokémon on the field by 33%.

name: Fairy Aura
description: Boosts the power of the Fairy-type moves of all Pokémon on the field by 33%.

name: Aura Break
description: The effects of Fairy Aura and Dark Aura are reversed and nullified, causing affected moves to be 25% weaker.

name: Primordial Sea
description: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Fire-type attacks.

name: Desolate Land
description: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Water-type attacks.

name: Delta Stream
description: The Pokémon changes the weather so that no moves are supereffective against the Flying type.

name: Stamina
description: When hit, raises the user's Defense by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.

name: Wimp Out
description: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP drops to ½ or less.

name: Emergency Exit
description: The Pokémon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP drops to ½ or less.

name: Water Compaction
description: Reduces damage from Water-type moves by 50% and raises Defense by 2 stages when hit by Water moves. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction. Defense boost applies after the hit lands. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.

name: Merciless
description: Guarantees critical hits against targets who are poisoned, paralyzed, bleeding, or have their speed lowered.

name: Shields Down
description: When its HP drops to ½ or less, the Pokémon’s shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

name: Stakeout
description: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.

name: Water Bubble
description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves and doubles the power of its Water-type moves. The Pokémon cannot be burned.

name: Steelworker
description: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Steel-type. If the user is Steel-type it resists Ghost and Dark, otherwise it gains Steel STAB.

name: Berserk
description: Berserk activates when the Pokemon drops to half HP or below from an opposing attack, boosting its highest attacking stat by one stage. Includes stat stages to determine which gets boosted. Triggers only once per battle. Other damage sources that bring you to half HP or below will not activate it.

name: Slush Rush
description: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat by 50% during hail. Also grants immunity to hail damage.

name: Long Reach
description: Long Reach prevents the user from making contact with targets when using contact moves. Additionally, physical moves receive a 1.2x damage boost.

name: Liquid Voice
description: Liquid Voice converts Normal- type sound moves to Water-type and boosts them by 20%.

name: Triage
description: Gives priority to the Pokémon’s healing moves.

name: Galvanize
description: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Electric-type. If the user is Electric-type its Electric-type moves have a 10% chance to paralyze, otherwise it gains Electric STAB.

name: Surge Surfer
description: Surge Surfer boosts the Pokemon's Speed by 50% when Electric Terrain is active. The boost applies immediately and disappears when it ends.

name: Schooling
description: The Pokémon forms a powerful school when it reaches level 20. It stops schooling when its HP drops to ¼ or less.

name: Disguise
description: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack at the cost of losing ⅛ of its max HP.

name: Battle Bond
description: Once per switch-in when the Pokémon knocks out a target, its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats are boosted. If a Greninja has this ability, it instead transforms into Ash-Greninja whenever it knocks out a target.

name: Power Construct
description: Cells gather to aid the Pokémon when its HP drops to ½ or less, causing it to change into its Complete Forme.

name: Corrosion
description: The Pokémon can poison or badly poison targets even if they’re Steel or Poison types.

name: Comatose
description: The Pokémon is always drowsing and can attack while in its sleeping state. It is considered under the effects of a status condition.

name: Queenly Majesty
description: The Pokémon’s majesty pressures opponents and makes them unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies next to it in battle.

name: Innards Out
description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move that knocks it out, it deals the same amount of damage to the attacker.

name: Dancer
description: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokémon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.
